title: linaria × dominii
intro: Linaria × dominii, also known as the Toadflax or Wild Toadflax, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the figwort family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Linaria × dominii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
